thought.text: 我将更新任务状态并检查修改文件列表。

task_list.title: Inspect task3 IR generation framework
task_list.notes: EmitIR is skeletal; Json2Asg supplies typed ASG from clang JSON including casts/control flow/arrays.

task_list.title: Run baseline task3 score
task_list.notes: Baseline score 1.37/100; only trivial main passed.

task_list.title: Implement missing IR generation semantics
task_list.notes: Rewrote EmitIR for types, globals/locals, arrays, expressions, calls, casts, control flow, loops, short-circuit logic.

task_list.title: Verify task3 score and iterate
task_list.notes: task3-score reports 100.00/100.00 across all listed cases.
